ruleBookInfo.init: :const doc = result; const info = {}; info.name = doc.match(/<h1[^>]*>([^<]*)<\/h1>/)?.[1] || ''; JSON.stringify(info);
ruleBookInfo.name: $.name
ruleBookInfo.author: :result.match(/作者[：:]([^<]*)/)?.[1]?.trim() || ''

ruleToc.chapterList: :const chapters = []; const items = result.match(/<li[^>]*>[\s\S]*?<\/li>/g) || []; for (const item of items) { chapters.push({ name: item.match(/<a[^>]*>([^<]*)<\/a>/)?.[1] || '', url: item.match(/href="([^"]*)"/)?.[1] || '' }); } JSON.stringify(chapters);
